title: Comestibles and Curatives Administration
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Comestibles and Curatives Administration''', or '''CCA''', was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] organization that routinely inspected food production companies and areas, to ensure that they met the proper standards.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{1stm}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
